name: Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Stalk fresh lemon grass, white part only, finely chopped
1 tbsp Red curry paste, or 1 teaspoon cayenne
1 tbsp Palm sugar or brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté shallots, garlic, and lemon grass in oil until soft.
2. Add red curry paste and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
3. Stir in peanut butter, palm sugar, fish sauce, and coconut milk.
4. Cook over medium heat until thick and syrupy (about 15 minutes). If the sauce is too thick, add water as needed.
5. Makes about 1 cup.
NOTE: To make coconut milk and cream, pour 1 can unsweetened coconut milk into a tall glass. Allow to sit for at least 1 hour so the thick cream rises to the top. Skim off the top (cream) and set aside. The rest is thin coconut milk.
